title: Yukon River Chinook Run Timing Project, 2021 Post-Season Wrap-Up
summary: The Yukon River Chinook salmon run arrived with close to average timing in 2021: The 50% point at Big Eddy drift was June 18th and the 50% point at Big Eddy set was June 22nd — both just slightly earlier than the pre-season forecast of June 23rd. An error of one to five days is within the historical...

title: 2021 Proxy Packets On The Way!
summary: 2021 Shareholder Proxy packets are in the mail and on their way to Shareholder’s homes. You don’t have to wait, however.
